pi_items.source: Task description and environment setup files.
Python geometry intersection (geopandas) of Natural Earth datasets and mock DXF export (ezdxf) showing expected size is ~23KB. 10000 is a safe lower bound.
DXF file format specifications and test export of the intersection geometry, confirming these are standard structural and entity markers present in the output.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world Natural Earth vector data. An independent intersection using Python (geopandas) confirmed that 2 rivers intersect Brazil, comprising 167 vertices. A test export to DXF generated a file of approximately 23KB containing standard DXF structural markers (SECTION, HEADER, ENTITIES) and vector entity types like AcDbLine or LWPOLYLINE. This verifies that a correct export will easily exceed the 10,000-byte minimum size constraint and contain the expected strings.
